name: YieldsPilot
description: Autonomous DeFi agent that manages staking yield with privacy-preserving reasoning. Deposits earn yield via Lido stETH; the agent can only spend the yield, never the principal. Reasoning is private (Venice), execution is public (onchain).

tools.name: lido_stake
tools.description: Stake ETH via Lido to receive stETH

tools.name: lido_unstake
tools.description: Request stETH withdrawal back to ETH

tools.name: uniswap_swap
tools.description: Execute token swaps via Uniswap Trading API v1 with Permit2

tools.name: venice_reason
tools.description: Private reasoning via Venice (no data retention)

tools.name: bankr_analyze
tools.description: Multi-model analysis via Bankr LLM Gateway

tools.name: telegram_alert
tools.description: Send vault monitoring alerts via Telegram

safety.principal_protection: Smart contract enforces principal is inaccessible to agent
safety.daily_spend_limit: Configurable basis points cap on daily yield spending
safety.allowed_targets: Whitelist of addresses agent can send yield to
safety.compute_budget: USD-denominated cap on daily inference spending
safety.pause_mechanism: Owner can pause all agent operations instantly
safety.dry_run_support: All write operations support dry_run preview
safety.risk_assessment: Multi-model risk check before every execution
